2026-05-14GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder Authorizing to Accept the Amendments to the International Health Regulations (2005) Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to accept, on behalf of Canada, the Amendments to the International Health Regulations (2005), adopted at Geneva on June 1, 2024.N/A
subject: Order Authorizing to Accept the Amendments to the International Health Regulations (2005)
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary to accept, on behalf of Canada, the Amendments to the International Health Regulations (2005), adopted at Geneva on June 1, 2024.
